more_upgrade_desc: Unlock AI-powered life insights, advanced wealth tracking, and seamless external integrations.
preview_modal_desc: You are witnessing a glimpse of the premium system. Upgrade to unlock full access.
preview_journal_benefit_3: Cloud Persistence - Unlimited entries with triple-layer security.
